headline: Jim Cramer Believes “Nobody Does Off-Price Better Than TJX”
summary: The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TJX) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed in this changing market. Cramer commented on the company’s latest earnings, as he said: Last week, we reached the part of the earnings season where we hear from the big retailers, and so far, calling it a mixed bag. Rather than taking them […]
